questionHtml: Predict, giving a reason, how a change in temperature from 298 K to 273 K would affect the spontaneity of the reaction.
markschemeHtml:
reaction «more» spontaneous/ΔG negative/less positive AND effect of negative entropy decreases/TΔS increases/is less negative/more positive
OR
reaction «more» spontaneous/ΔG negative/less positive AND reaction exothermic «so Kc increases » ✔

Award mark if correct calculation shown.

meta.title: Predict, giving a reason, how a change in temperature from 298 K to 273 K would affect the spontaneity of the reaction.
